verdict: Moderate risk of AI displacement, with some tasks becoming more routine and others being augmented by AI tools.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 2, and 4 involve analyzing financial information, which is a routine cognitive task that can be automated by AI tools.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: While some creative judgment is required in tasks 3 and 11, the overall role of a wealth manager involves more procedural tasks that can be augmented by AI.

evidence_ledger.meta: Task list for Personal Financial Advisors
evidence_ledger.contribution: Provides authoritative task list for the occupation
Provides a general overview of the role and industry

adjacent_careers.name: Financial Advisor
adjacent_careers.reasoning: This role is more focused on investment planning, while financial advisors may handle a broader range of tasks.

adjacent_careers.name: Investment Manager
adjacent_careers.reasoning: This role involves managing investment portfolios, which is a similar task to wealth management

recent_developments.headline: AI-powered financial planning tools gain popularity among wealth managers
recent_developments.impact: These tools are expected to augment the work of wealth managers, but may not replace them entirely.

recent_developments.headline: Banks roll out AI copilots to analysts and traders
recent_developments.impact: JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman now offer LLM tools to thousands of frontline staff.

quotes.quote: AI is going to change every job. Every single job. Some jobs it will eliminate, some jobs it will improve, and some jobs it will create.
quotes.speaker: Jamie Dimon
quotes.title: CEO, JPMorgan Chase

quotes.quote: Two-thirds of jobs in the United States and Europe are exposed to some degree of AI automation, and roughly a quarter of current work could be done by generative AI.
quotes.speaker: Joseph Briggs and Devesh Kodnani
quotes.title: Economists, Goldman Sachs Research
quotes.source: Goldman Sachs report: The Potentially Large Effects of AI on Economic Growth

quotes.quote: Generative AI could add the equivalent of 2.6 to 4.4 trillion dollars in value annually across the global economy. Banking, high-tech, and life sciences capture the largest share.
quotes.speaker: McKinsey Global Institute
quotes.title: Research report
quotes.source: The Economic Potential of Generative AI
